title: Share your nonprofit workflow

posts.author: lrosalanko (Lauren Rosalanko)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey everyone!

So many of you are using monday.com in ways like fundraising or project management. There are people from hundreds of different types of nonprofits here but sometimes boards and workflows might be relevant for other community members. This is one of the coolest parts of this community—giving you more ideas for how to get more from the platform!

Share your use case here and include screenshots of your boards to help other people learn from you!

If you’re looking for a specific use case or workflow and you’re not sure where to start, why not ask other users for their help here?
